criteria_results.criterion: Folding a list[dict] formset prefill with a given prefix sets {prefix}-{i}-{field} for each row/field.
criteria_results.evidence: 9 slice_fold_formset tests; keys match collectDraftState grammar, consumable by _draft_state_row_count.

criteria_results.criterion: REPLACE clears prior direct rows (incl. stale higher-index) for the prefix; empty-list clears all direct rows.
criteria_results.evidence: 3-row then 2-row REPLACE test (row 2 cleared); empty-list test; audit re-ran.

criteria_results.criterion: REPLACE does NOT delete management-form keys ({prefix}-TOTAL_FORMS...) nor nested-child keys (criteria-{i}-measurement-...); preserved untouched.
criteria_results.evidence: Hazard test: criteria-TOTAL_FORMS + criteria-0-measurement-0-channel survive a criteria REPLACE; deletion scope ^{prefix}-\d+-[^-]+$ verified against the real field space (no hyphenated fields).

criteria_results.criterion: Folded draft_state is consumable: _draft_state_row_count==len(prefill), milestone improvement_types read in order; round-trips through PlanDraftState.
criteria_results.evidence: criterion-4 test: real D1 prefill -> save_version/load_latest -> build_grounding -> _draft_state_row_count==2, _draft_state_milestone_improvement_types==['ACAD','POLICY']. Non-vacuous (DB round-trip).

criteria_results.criterion: Pure, no retired-workshop import, raises a clear domain error on a non-list prefill (and non-dict row).
